scope.target: EVAL-001 deterministic corpus, oracle, comparison, and aggregate gate
constraints: Run without model calls or network access
Cover empty, existing, copied-template, software-development, customization, and identifier-compatibility families
Fail closed on structural or semantic drift
Keep release-side model evaluation separately approved
non_goals: Select or call a model or judge
Activate taxonomy or skill identifier transitions
Add stochastic evaluation to routine downstream gates

steps: Define the corpus manifest and normalized result schema
Add checked-in inputs and exact expected outputs
Implement the model-free runner and negative mutations
Register the suite in aggregate validation
validation: deterministic evaluation unit and mutation tests
execution.last_completed_step: Created the bounded deterministic EVAL workflow and task
execution.next_action: Implement the EVAL-owned deterministic corpus and oracle

results.residual_risk: Model-in-the-loop release evaluation remains unapproved and must not be inferred from deterministic results.
